message:
✨ Auto-resolve missing logos at startup & ffmpeg proxy for EAC-3 audio (#77)

- Logo resolution: strip country prefixes (CA, UK) from channel names
  for better matching against tv-logo/tv-logos GitHub repo and EPG icons.
  Add resolveAllMissingLogos() called at startup to fix existing channels.
- Stream proxy: new StreamProxy class pipes streams through system ffmpeg
  with -c copy to fix EAC-3 audio detection (codec tag 0x0087 not recognized
  by media_kit's bundled FFmpeg). Auto-detects missing audio after 3s and
  transparently retries through the local proxy.
- Remove experimental ad=lavc settings that caused crashes on some streams.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
